He ends up overbalancing, dragging the back foot out of the crease. And Litton makes him pay with some sharp glovework.

full_text: Tanzim Hasan Sakib to Max ODowd, Caught&Bowled!! Oh brilliant reflexes from Tanzim to hang onto this! Only thing in favour of Tanzim was that it was straight at him around chest height. But full marks for getting his hands in the right position.
